text: Thank you for calling today. I understand you have been waiting for an update on your order, and I can see why that would be frustrating. I have reviewed your account, and the good news is that the shipment has already been released by our warehouse and is scheduled for delivery tomorrow afternoon. I will stay with you for a moment, explain exactly what happens next, and make sure you know how to reach us immediately if anything still looks off.
instruction: Speak like a calm, empathetic customer support agent. Medium pace. Clear pronunciation. Warm but professional tone. Sound patient, reassuring, and confident without sounding overly cheerful.<|endofprompt|>

text: I also want to be fully transparent about the billing question you raised. The charge you are seeing is not a duplicate payment. It is a temporary authorization that appears when the original invoice is updated before settlement. In most cases it disappears automatically within three to five business days. If it does not clear in that window, I can open a priority finance ticket for you and send written confirmation while we are still on this call.
instruction: Speak like an experienced customer support agent handling a billing concern. Reassuring, concise, and professional. Keep the delivery clear and steady, with a helpful tone that reduces customer anxiety.<|endofprompt|>

text: Before we finish, I want to mention one option that may save your team time going forward. Since you are already using the reporting module every week, the professional plan would let you automate those exports, add role-based access for managers, and reduce the manual follow-up your staff is doing today. There is no pressure to decide on this call, but if you want, I can send a short comparison after we resolve the current issue so you can review it with your team.
instruction: Speak like a senior customer success and inside sales representative. Sound consultative, credible, and low-pressure. Professional business tone, moderate pace, with a clear transition from support into soft upsell.<|endofprompt|>

text: I appreciate your patience while I looked into that for you. I have confirmed the status, documented the case, and sent the follow-up notes to your email so you do not have to repeat the details again if you contact us later today.
prompt_text: This is a reference voice sample for the zero shot baseline. Please use this speaker identity while keeping the speech natural and professional.
